creator: as@cmplx.uk
text:
Actually, the file is indeed missing:

# file /usr/local/share/texmf-dist/fonts/enc/dvips/base/8r.enc
/usr/local/share/texmf-dist/fonts/enc/dvips/base/8r.enc: cannot open `/usr/local/share/texmf-dist/fonts/enc/dvips/base/8r.enc' (No such file or directory)

In fact the whole usr/local/share/texmf-dist/fonts/enc/dvips is missing:

# ls -al /usr/local/share/texmf-dist/fonts/enc/
total 20
drwxr-xr-x   5 root  wheel  512 Feb  9 08:40 .
drwxr-xr-x  22 root  wheel  512 Dec  5 11:33 ..
drwxr-xr-x   4 root  wheel  512 Dec  5 11:32 pdftex
drwxr-xr-x   2 root  wheel  512 Dec  5 11:32 t2
drwxr-xr-x   3 root  wheel  512 Dec  5 11:32 ttf2pk
#
